ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2001 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case is ordered dismissed without prejudice. Court finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiffs' failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)
